[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111111 6
1 00000010 1
2 00100111 4
3 00010101 3
4 10010100 3
5 11001000 3
6 00100111 4
7 00010101 3

01 10 11010000 3
12 21 00010101 3 match 3 7
23 32 00000010 1 match 1
34 43 00000000 a
45 54 11000000 2
56 65 10000000 1
67 76 10001010 3
70 07 11001010 4

02 20 00011010 3
13 31 00000000 a
24 42 00111101 5
35 53 00000000 a
46 64 10101001 4
57 75 11000000 2
60 06 10001010 3
71 17 11000000 2

03 30 00000010 1 match 1
14 41 11010101 5
25 52 00000000 a
36 63 00000010 1 match 1
47 74 11001000 3 match 5
50 05 11000000 2
61 16 10000001 2
72 27 00001010 2

04 40 11011000 4
15 51 11000000 2
26 62 00101011 4
37 73 00000010 1 match 1
